title: Qatar Airways evacuates 300 Indians stranded in Doha: Indian embassy - Telegraph India
description: The Indian government has evacuated over 300 stranded Indians from Qatar due to the ongoing tensions.
content:
Qatar Airways evacuates 300 Indians stranded in Doha: Indian embassy  Telegraph India

2 UAE soldiers die in helicopter crash due to ‘technical malfunction’  The Times of Israel

Two UAE Soldiers Killed In Helicopter Crash After Technical Glitch  News18

UAE envoy to UN urges de-escalation to war, says 'will not partake in any attacks on Iran'  Khaleej Times

LIVE UPDATES: Qatar extends condolences to UAE over death of two Armed Forces' members  The Peninsula Qatar

Qatar Airways Evacuates 300 Indians Stranded in Doha: Indian Embassy Tweets

India faces a tense situation with tensions flaring between its ally the UAE and Iran. The Indian government has recently evacuated over 300 stranded Indians from Qatar to prevent further unrest.

A chaotic scene at a border checkpoint shows officials and evacuation vehicles preparing for the arrival of the evacuees. Despite efforts, the evacuation process was marred by delays due to technical glitches in the Qatar Airways' flight system. The Indian embassy has strongly condemned these events, urging all parties involved to de-escalate tensions and prevent any further escalation.

UAE soldiers have also been killed in a helicopter crash on Monday, following a 'technical malfunction'. The UAE government is now calling for a ceasefire as it seeks to calm the situation.

The Iranian Foreign Ministry has welcomed this move by India as a sign of increased dialogue between the two nations.
